evals.name: direct-trigger-en
evals.expected_output: Skill 'cp-audience' is triggered and produces structured output
expectations: Output follows the skill's documented workflow steps

evals.name: direct-trigger-zh
evals.expected_output: 技能 'cp-audience' 被正确触发并生成结构化输出

evals.name: indirect-trigger
evals.prompt: Who should I be writing for? Help me define my reader
evals.expected_output: Skill 'cp-audience' is correctly matched despite indirect phrasing
expectations: Routes to cp-audience skill despite not using exact keywords
Asks for necessary clarifications before proceeding

evals.name: output-structure
evals.prompt: define my target audience. Use minimal sample data — I just want to verify the output format is correct.
evals.expected_output: Produces output matching the skill's documented deliverable format
expectations: Artifact is saved to the correct path per conventions
Markdown formatting is correct if applicable
